assertions.text: Loads and references specific milestone papers from the knowledge base for comparison
Outputs both English X thread AND Chinese 小红书 content
小红书 content uses card-by-card format (cover + figure cards + text cards + tail card)
Identifies a focused core insight (not just a summary of the paper)
Flags knowledge base gaps for relevant sub-fields
Ends with Step 6 dialogue invitation asking user for feedback
